testcase.name: createJoinWhiteMove_e2e4_updatesFen
testcase.system-out:

The following 1 profile is active: "test" 2026-05-13 11:10:08 [main] WARN org.hibernate.orm.deprecation - HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-05-13 11:10:08 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - drop table if exists games cascade 2026-05-13 11:10:08 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - drop table if exists move cascade 2026-05-13 11:10:08 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - drop table if exists player cascade 2026-05-13 11:10:08 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table games ( in_check boolean, in_checkmate boolean, in_stalemate boolean, move_count integer, current_turn_color varchar(5), black_player_id bigint unique, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, white_player_id bigint unique, fen LONGTEXT, game_id varchar(255) not null unique, mode varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-05-13 11:10:08 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table move ( created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, game_state_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, move_timestamp bigint, from_square varchar(255) not null, promotion varchar(255), to_square varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-05-13 11:10:08 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - create table player ( color varchar(1), difficulty integer, is_ai boolean, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, id bigint generated by default as identity, last_seen bigint, connection_status varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, player_id varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) 2026-05-13 11:10:08 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - alter table if exists games add constraint FKof6gb88h93nx51mbuoomcltch foreign key (black_player_id) references player 2026-05-13 11:10:08 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - alter table if exists games add constraint FKrr2c4h9rdplgb08hqmxi309k7 foreign key (white_player_id) references player 2026-05-13 11:10:08 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering.
